If they don't improve or if your eyes become more swollen or unusual symptoms develop, seek medical attention. This approach allows you to continue your field work while addressing your symptoms.

3. Keep windows closed to prevent pollen from entering.
4. Use a saline eye rinse to soothe your eyes.

These steps can help manage your symptoms while continuing your field work.
